entry.title: Re: Service Order with Advance Shipment of Spare Parts
entry.content:
hi Maggie

yes, item category SRVU supports Advance Shipment of Procured Service Parts. In this process, a purchase requisition is created from the service order to procure the service parts from a supplier, and also a sales order to handle the outbound logistics to the customer. 

This is supported as of release 2023 FPS1 with Item-based Accounting

Regards, Gert

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content: Hello! I’m Abdelrahman, and I’m thrilled to join the SAP Community Beginner Corner. I’m with Edraky, where we specialize in offering thorough SAP training and implementation services to businesses throughout the Middle East. Our mission is to assist companies in effectively adopting and leveraging SAP solutions to their fullest potential. As a new member of the Beginner Corner, I’m excited to connect with the community, learn from seasoned SAP experts, and contribute my own insights. Please feel free to send me a private message—I’m eager to dive in and get started!

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi @PedroARomero ,

Thanks for the submission. Please enable search field and search with a description.

entry.title: 4 Step semi-sequential payment approval
entry.content:
In this blog, we will discuss How to configure a semi-sequential payment approval. The idea is to restrict the same approvers from approving payment batches in the 2nd and 3rd approval steps.

Image/data in this blog is from SAP internal systems, sample data, or demo systems. Any resemblance to real data is purely coincidental.

Follow the steps to configure a semi-sequential payment approval.

  1. Configure new Approval Groups, Approval Patterns in configuration activity / SSC-UI ID 102336 - Define Settings for Bank Account Master Data.
  2. Add new Approval Groups for 4 Steps Semi-Sequential Approval

  3. Approval pattern for 4 Steps Semi-Sequential Approval with limits on the 4th Step.

  4. Assign the approval pattern to the company code and account type.
  5. Maintain the payment approvers and assign the approvers group in the App Manage Bank Accounts for the bank account.

  6. Press the button Show Approval Steps to Display the Approval steps for the bank account payment approval.

entry.title: Re: Invoicing in SAP Ariba
entry.content:
SAP Ariba 2408 Release
With latest SAP Ariba 2408 Release, we now have following new Features related to Invoicing:

  1. Support for PDF with Embedded UBL Invoice for KSA [NG-6119]
    Buyers can now receive PDFs containing embedded UBL invoice from suppliers of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia through email. This feature is applicable only for PDFs generated outside SAP Business Network (inbound flow). The embedded UBL invoice in the PDF is the legal invoice approved by the Saudi Arabian Tax and Customs Authority (ZATCA). Details here.
  2. E-Invoicing in Romania for Outbound Invoices [NG-6482]
    The Romanian tax authority known as National Agency for Fiscal Administration of Romania (ANAF), mandates the Romanian suppliers to issue electronic invoices for domestic and cross-border transactions, effective July 2024. To adhere to this mandate, SAP Business Network now supports electronic tax invoicing in Romania for outbound invoices (invoices created by suppliers using SAP Business Network). This functionality allows invoices generated on SAP Business Network validate against the ANAF portal and receive the Romanian UBL invoice as an attachment. Details here.
  3. Copy Non-PO Invoices with Custom Forms [AINV-2108]
    Previously, users could copy non-PO invoices but if the invoice was created using a form, line item details didn't copy onto the new invoice. Now, when users copy non-PO invoices created from a form, all the details copy onto the new invoice.
  4. Line-Item Credit and Debit Memo Label Change for Malaysia [NG-6275]
    For Malaysian invoices, the Line-Item Credit Memo and Line-Item Debit Memo UI labels are now displayed as Credit Note and Debit Note respectively as per the local tax regulations.

entry.title: Re: EWM RF Framework - predefined field value
entry.content: Hello Christian,

entry.title: Recalculation of header conditions when cancelling a position within S/4 order
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

we are facing the error of a header condition not getting recalculated when cancelling an item position and I wanted to ask you for your experience in this (basically whether this is possible with customizing or a SAP note, we would like to avoid ABAP coding here). 

Imagine the following usecase: 

A customer gets an overall discount on his first order of 10€. He orders two items, one for 75€ and the other one for 25€. 

The overall order value would be 90€ containing two positions. 

  • Position 1: 67,50€ (75€ - 7,50€ (as discount amount is calculated depending on the portion of the overall order value, in this case three quarters (75€/100€ (original order value)). 
  • Position 2: 22,50€ (25€ - 2,50€) - same logic as above

Now the customer cancels position 2. A cancellation reason is set on item level within VA02. However, the header discount does not get recalculated. This means the new order value of the order is now 67,50€ (instead of the expected 65€). The customer has lost 2,50€ of this discount. 

We have tried multiple customizing settings but have not come to a solution. This is a very common usecase for us as we use header conditions for vouchers as well as discounts. Maybe someone has made a similar experience and could share solution approach. 

Thank you in advance and have a nice day,

Henning

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi,

Kindly add consumption.valuehelpdefinition for the status field and map the text to the status text field. 
You can use Objectmod.text

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar ,

Could you please correct here and what exactly need to be put. I was trying from past few days and did not got the success. This is taking lot of time from my end. Also, these all are new concepts to me and thats why i am struggling here.

@AbapCatalog.viewEnhancementCategory: [#NONE]

@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #NOT_REQUIRED

@EndUserText.label: 'CDS View entity'

@Metadata.ignorePropagatedAnnotations: true

@ObjectModel.usageType:{

serviceQuality: #X,

sizeCategory: #S,

dataClass: #MIXED

}

@UI.headerInfo.typeName: 'Travel'

@UI.headerInfo.typeNamePlural: 'Travels'

@Search.searchable: true

@ObjectModel.semanticKey: [ 'Description' ]

 

define view entity Ztravel_entity5 as select from ztravel_new5

association [0..1] to /DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH as _Status on _Status.OverallStatus = $projection.Status

{

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 10 }]

@UI.selectionField: [{ position: 10 }]

key

 

travel_id as TravelId,

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 20 }]

@Search.defaultSearchElement: true

@Search.fuzzinessThreshold: 0.90

description as Description,

@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 30 }]

total_price as TotalPrice,

currency_code as CurrencyCode,

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 40 }]

concat_with_space( cast ( total_price as abap.char(25) ), currency_code, 1) as NewPriceCurrencyCode,

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 50 }]

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'ZHELP_NEW5' , element: 'status'} } ]

status as Status,

@UI.lineItem: [{ position: 60 }]

@UI.selectionField: [{ position: 20 }]

_Status._Text.Text as overallStatusText,

_Status

 

}

entry.title: Re: Fields in Custom Business Objects
entry.content:
There is no such limitation.

However, as the field continues to grow, the amount of stored data also increases.

Therefore, browsing data (or accessing it via OData service) may cause timeout issues, but this is not a limitation of the field itself.

Creating Custom Business Objects

entry.title: exportView issue in story with Optimized design Experience
entry.content:
Hello SAC experts,

I am developping a story with Optimized Design Experience (and a new model) and for many reasons, I use scripting to export the story in PDF.
But, when a user select the "cancel" button in the SAC's automatic export message (popUp)
(
 this one)
the processus is breaking  (fortunately) but :
       - the script seems as broken :
                            > I tried to catch the boolean result of the API "exportView" but it is impossible to catch it (> impossible to use a mere "consol.log" to display the value)

        - and the story is freezed :
                           > no action or interaction is possible.

So, I think that is a big API bug from SAP analytics Cloud but does anyone have a workarround's idea, please ?
Thanks, in advance, for your valuable help.

It is about devaluation of the goods in an application but not by value but by percentage whether this is possible? Is there an application for this?

 

Best regards 

Sabedini

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi Ajay,

Yes, the warning comes up as there is potential for the data to be altered like example if it has translations. To avoid this, you can filter out by specifying the language and add '1' to document the change cardinality. Check this link for more information: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/acquire-core-abap-skills/using-associations-in-path-expre...

entry.title: Re: Category Management with SAP Ariba
entry.content:
SAP Ariba 2408 Release
With 2408 Release, we now have following new Features related to SAP Ariba Category Management:

  1. Ability to View Supplier Risk Level in SAP Ariba Category Management [CAT-5800]
    This Risk & Category Management integration allows category managers to view and assess the risk level (Low, Medium, and High) associated with each supplier in SAP Ariba Category Management. Understanding the risk level associated with a supplier can help category managers with their strategy decisions.
  2. Ability to Maintain Attachments in the Develop Strategy and Plan App [CAT-6798]
    This feature enables you to add attachments for strategy and plan documents in the Develop Strategy and Plan app. You can add a file or URL type of attachment to the Develop Strategy and Plan app to complement your category strategy and execution processes.
  3. Ability to Create Cost Structures from Market Intelligence Provider Data [CAT-7893]
    This feature allows you to import custom domain codes from market intelligence providers into SAP Ariba Category Management and map the provider's codes to your categories. You can also create cost structures by selecting the relevant report from market intelligence providers within the Develop Strategy and Plan app.
  4. Support for Simplified Provisioning in SAP Ariba Category Management [CAT-6779]
    This feature allows you to request provisioning for the SAP Ariba Category Management solution through your SAP for Me account. It triggers an automatic provisioning process on SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP). This automatic provisioning reduces the number of manual steps required to set up the SAP Ariba Category Management subscription on SAP BTP.
  5. Change of SCIM System to a New Connector for Provisioning Users in SAP Ariba Category Management [CAT-7671]
    This release introduces a new connector named SAP Ariba Category Management within the Identity Provisioning service, specifically designed for provisioning users to SAP Ariba Category Management. This connector replaces the SCIM System that was used earlier for user provisioning.
  6. Change of Support Component for SAP Ariba Category Management [CAT-9368]
    This release introduces a new support component, S2P-SRC-CATM, for SAP Ariba Category Management. The new component replaces the BNS-ARI-CAT support component that was previously used to submit support requests (cases) related to SAP Ariba Category Management.

entry.title: Re: Nested structure to internal table data transfer
entry.content:
Try this:

TYPES ty_table TYPE REF TO data.
DATA lt_einarecord TYPE TABLE OF ty_table.
FIELD-SYMBOLS <fs_it> TYPE ANY TABLE.

APPEND INITIAL LINE TO lt_einarecord ASSIGNING FIELD-SYMBOL(<fs_table>).
GET REFERENCE OF <fs_it> INTO <fs_table>.

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi,

For the question on when metadata extension has to be used. It's a good practice to use metadata extension where you define all UI annotations. In the consumption view you define those annotations which helps you understand the behavior of the fields.

For the value help, 

1. Since you have 2 fields with Status and text, apply annotation @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition to the status field. 

2. Use the annotation @ObjectModel.text.element: and map the ''text' field. This will give you dropdown with the available values.

entry.title: Re: Notification for 'Edit and Approve Purchase Requisiti...
entry.content:
Hello @gebguy00 

Email notifications can be sent to requestor in below scenarios.
- To workflow initiators (requestors) when a workflow item is approved or rejected. Template used - SWF_WORKFLOW_COMPLETE_NOTIFY
- To recipients (requestors) when a workflow item is sent back for rework. Template used - SWF_CRT_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS

Refer below link for more details.
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/f83f5260160d40a4ac1797e7d8b1eb5e.html?version=2408.500 

Additional
Manage Workflows for Purchase Requisitions - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/bacc21e14d6c4b0fbf53dca3218abdd5.html?version=2408.500 

Best Regards,
Vijayendra

Thank you and best regards, 

Katie

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Check compatibility pack usage in SAP S/4HANA with SAP EarlyWatch Alert
entry.content:
How-to:

Many compatibility packs will expire at the end of December 2025. Are you aware if you are using compatibility packs in your SAP S/4HANA on-premise or private cloud edition? A new service feature helps you evaluate the risk of becoming non-compliant and losing SAP Support for some of your business processes. The SAP EarlyWatch Alert (EWA) service has introduced a new check and report chapter for your convenience.

Watch this demo video on the topic:  Demo Video

Simply use this link to check your systems: Landscape Check

It will list your systems under the alert "Compatibility Usage Expiry 31.12.2025" if any issues were found. The information is only visible to S-Users in your company and is protected by the SAP EarlyWatch Alert authorisation in SAP for Me. Click on the system IDs to open the report chapter, which lists the transactions, reports, business functions, and releases which will expire. 

Prerequisites:

- SAP S/4HANA on-premise: Your system must send EWA data to SAP. See SAP Note FAQ- Using SAP EarlyWatch Alert.

- SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition: All production systems have already activated the service out-of-the-box.

- You need a valid S-User in SAP for Me with the following authorisations: 

  • Service Reports and Feedback

  • Manage Alert(s) in SAP EarlyWatch Alert for all S-users

Request the authorisation here: Authorization Request 

If you have any issues with authorisations: Get Support on XX-SER-SAPSMP-USR

Chapter Content:

The new report chapter lists the compatibility packages in use over the last three months. If the functionality was used in the last month, a red rating is triggered (which can be removed with the snooze button; see next section). For each Simplification Item, we provide a specific SAP Note with background information on the business process and an alternative way forward. The check does not cover items expiring in 2030 and includes most, but not all, compatibility packs that expire at the end of 2025. For full coverage, please use the SAP Readiness Check. SAP EarlyWatch Alert helps you track the usage on a weekly basis and measure your success in replacing the functionality.

Feedback to SAP: 

Are you already aware of the usage issues and want to let SAP know you are working on a solution? This can be achieved using the Snooze feature in the app Solution Finder:

1. Open the list of alerts: Alert List

2. Navigate to the Alerts tab.

3. Click the Snooze button (stopwatch icon on the right side).

4. Enter your resolution date into the field "Relevant again on:".

5. Choose the reason "In Implementation" or "Upgrade planned" from the drop-down menu.

Now your SAP contacts can see that you are already aware and working on a resolution.

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar ,

PFB screenshot.

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "ABAP Core Data Services" developer challenge
entry.content:
Hi,

use this annotation for Status. It'll take the text value from overallStatusText as it is mapped in the annotation @ObjectModel.text.element. Since you are using the standard view in Association you can use the same in valuehelpdefinition.

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: '/DMO/I_Overall_Status_VH',element: 'OverallStatus' } }]

@ui.lineItem: [{ position: 90 }]

@ui.selectionField: [{ position: 90 }]

@ObjectModel.text.element: [ 'overallStatusText' ]

@ui.textArrangement: #TEXT_ONLY

status as Status,

entry.title: Re: Engineering Record Statuses
entry.content:

The only option is 10, 20, and 50.

Also, my new Status of 60 is not showing in the ER

How can this be done?

We are using the following with S/4

entry.title: Re: How to check ATP results for multiple items on one sc...
entry.content: When it comes to ATP, we have already the app Monitor Product Availability available, which is basically the transaction co09. It only offers to get an availability for one material/plant at the time. But there is some good news. We are working on a successor Fiori app called Display Product Availability. The Display Product Availability app will give you the possibility to see an Availability Overview of multiple material plant combinations. This will be possible on plant level as well as on storage location level. In the first increment there will not yet be a detailed view where you can see the different supply and demand elements in detail, but this is planned for the second increment. If you want to export the data, you can do this by using Excel download in the first increment. The first increment is planned to be delivered with a CFD release soon. Alternatively, you have of course the possibility to use the release OData API Product Availability Info.

entry.title: Re: Building Validation on the Workflow levels for Custom MDF
entry.content: Nice one Harpreet

entry.title: #01 - Discover the Onboarding Journey with SAP: Your Roadmap to Success
entry.content:
So, you’ve signed the contract with SAP—what’s next? Your onboarding journey has officially begun. This journey is designed to ensure a smooth and successful implementation of your SAP solution, and it’s divided into four key phases: Get Started with SAP, Plan Your Implementation, Get Enabled, and Prepare to Go Live.

The Onboarding Journey Begins

As soon as the contract is signed, the onboarding process kicks off. Within four days, your designated IT Contact Person (written in the contract) will receive a welcome email from SAP. This email containing the essential info on how to get started with the solution. Please, request this contact to verify the spam folder.

What’s Inside the Welcome Email?

This welcome email is your first step on the onboarding journey. It directs you to essential assets that will be your companions throughout the implementation:

  • Onboarding Resource Center: This is your one-stop-shop for all things onboarding. It houses a comprehensive collection of guides, checklists, and tools that will help you navigate each phase of your journey.
  • Onboarding Webinars: These webinars are designed to provide you with deep insights into the onboarding process, offering expert advice and best practices.
  • Embedded Launch Activities (EmLA) Resources: If your solution includes Embedded Launch Activities, these resources will be invaluable. They’re tailored to ensure that your launch is as seamless as possible.
  • Preferred Success Information: If you’ve purchased Preferred Success, this email will also provide details on how to access this premium support service, which is designed to accelerate your SAP journey.

Note: It’s important to distinguish this Welcome Email from the Provisioning Email. The Provisioning Email, which you’ll receive later, contains critical system information, whereas the Welcome Email focuses on resources to help you get started.

What Should You Do Next?

From the moment the contract is signed until it officially starts, it’s crucial to familiarize yourself with the content of the onboarding journey. Here’s what we recommend:

  1. Explore the Onboarding Resource Center: Take the time to browse through the resources available. This will give you a solid understanding of what to expect and how to prepare for each phase.
  2. Incorporate the Four Phases into Your Project Timeline: Use the assets provided to map out the four phases of the onboarding journey within your project timeline. This will ensure that your team is aligned and ready for each stage.
  3. Register for the Onboarding Webinars: These sessions are invaluable for getting up to speed with the onboarding process. Make sure to plan, register, and join these sessions to gain insights and clarify any questions you might have.

Need an Implementation Partner?

If you’re still looking for an implementation partner, SAP provides a helpful resource at Find SAP Partners. This page helps you understand the benefits of working with an SAP partner, how to select the right one, and how to locate potential partners using SAP Partner Finder. Choosing the right partner can make a significant difference in the success of your implementation.

In Conclusion

The onboarding journey with SAP is meticulously designed to ensure that you’re fully prepared for a successful implementation. By following the steps outlined in the welcome email and leveraging the resources provided, you’ll set a strong foundation for your project. Remember, this journey is not just about getting started—it’s about ensuring long-term success with your SAP solution. So take the time to explore, plan, and engage with the resources at your disposal. The road to a successful go-live starts here.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Check out other blogs from the series: Customer Onboarding at SAP
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

entry.title: Re: Sending notification to SAP build workzone from CAP app
entry.content: I suggest you read through the CAP Plugin documentation: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/node.js/cds-plugins

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Hi @Shilpa_Shankar - Thanks for your feedback. Changed the filter to Status Text instead of the Status Code.

Please find the below screen shot for the same.

Regards,

Chandana.

entry.title: Re: Advance Return Management complete configuration(SAP ARM)
entry.content:
yes we can perform STO from Order Directly or after receiving Stock to our plants

I not sure what you selected Stock type in Warehouse Inspection may be that Create additional Document or check you Product is it Valued or non valued

entry.content: Did you already read FAQ 876617 - FAQ: Header conditions or header condition screen in Pricing (SD-BF-PR) ?

entry.title: Re: is it possible to lock and unlock a transaction?
entry.content: Can we make it automated as per specific time to  lock/unlock the T codes

entry.title: Re: ODN number appears should appear in the Alt. Refer. f...
entry.content: Yes that is correct!

entry.title: Building side-by-side extensions on SAP BTP: error not found after deployment
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I've been trying to complete this tutorial for a while: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp/exercise-performing-a-manual-deployment_d0546e9b-810f-41b1-b554-e2a01c9dc7b0

I've started from scratch many times, but I always encounter the same error. Everything works correctly until I deploy the application.

After assigning the 'RiskManager' role to my user, I go to the Applications section in my SAP BTP cockpit. I choose the risk-management application:

When I click on the application route, I get this:

And when I access locally, this is what I get:

I have already tried to do it by clearing the cache and from an incognito window, but it gives the same error.

Prior to deployment, the application worked fine locally.

Thank you all in advance.

entry.title: 'Where can I start learning how to configur SAP SuccessFactors Payroll Control Center?
entry.content:
I recommend to access our Configuring SAP SuccessFactors Payroll Control Center learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey provides the configurations you need to implement and support SAP SuccessFactors Payroll Control Center.

Learning objectives
After completing this learning journey, consultants will be able to perform and configure the core functionalities within SAP SuccessFactors Payroll Control Center and access the resources and support available to configure additional features.

Prerequisites

  • Getting Started with SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central Payroll 
  • Getting Started with SAP HCM and HCM Payroll

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area.

Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: If there a BADI for fb03->select position->change text?
entry.content: Are you looking for a BAPI - FB02, FB09: BAPI - and not a BAdI ?

entry.title: Mass Change Active Materials Type - All materials ROH - FERT
entry.content:
This is a what if question. I think it's totally insane to do. But I don't make those decisions.

If you think about doing a mass change to your material master and I mean all of your materials.   

How long do you think it will take?

Can it be done?

Will the history be kept?

The background:
We have a limited amount of materials 8,371 - material plant combinations.  We are trying to inactivate/delete what we don't use.  That's a project going on now.  We were mid-flight on an upgrade / that is on-hold now.  

We are using all of OTC, all of BTC, all of PTP but we do not have the WM level only the IM.

We use process orders only - no production orders.   Yes, weird.

We have a custom programs, enhancement points, BAPI, BADI, Gateway, CDS, FIORI....  You get the picture.   Around 9000.  I can do the scope for these.   It would take me quite a bit of time.

We have been on SAP since late 1990s.    4.6C to HANA 1709.   All on-premise except for our analytics.   We have several third party products and APIs to all of them.   I would have to call them each individually.

Our consultants are saying it would be done by  the end of the year.   I am saying reimplementation and then I don't even know if it could be done because of the history.  (That's a gut feel and it would take at least an year in my opinion )

Has anyone successfully done this?   Time-line?  Yes we have all kind of transactions against these materials going on - all of the time.

Any information would be helpful.   It's hard for me to get over my mental block of don't do it.

Thank you!

Michelle

Oh yeah - no idea what area to put this one in.   It covers all of them.

entry.title: Error Sync PriceDiscountList in CCO
entry.content:
Hi Community,

i try to sync the PriceDiscountList in Customer Checkout. I got an Error Message in the Log-File "During synchronization a new object was found through a relationship that was not marked cascade". 

Can anyone help me to find out what the problem is?

The Warning Button in CCO is empty and with no further information.

BackEndSystem SapBusinessOne - SQL - Customer Checkout Version 2.0 FP20 PL00

Thank you very much - Best Regards Daniela

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Boleto files
entry.content:
Hi kedalenechong,

These files are required for Brazil (BR) localization banking processes.

Ideally, you should not delete those as those are not impacting any other system functionality.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: 关于给公司分配公司代码的疑问
entry.content:
Hello @Rock_Liang 

SSCUI 102728 is available for assigning Company Code to Cross-system Company Code.
I do not see it as challenge as you will be only using it to view the invoices. For complete usage of this SSCUI I would recommend you to refer to the documentation provided in CBC as link.

Best Regards,
Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations
entry.content:
Preview 

Filter on Description only

 

Description filter + Status filter

entry.title: Re: Lost Something? Use The Enterprise Search!
entry.content:
HI Maya, You state in your post that is it easy to customize the number of results you get from a search. I have a customer where enterprise search gives way to many results when searching for a material in a maintenance order. Where can I change this?

Best regards Patrick

entry.title: Re: Inventory Posting List hang even in SAP integration w...
entry.content:
Hi kedalenechong,

The issue got fixed in SAP Business One 10.0 SP 2311, version for SAP HANA.

Which version and patch are you using?

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Handle PDF response from called URL using sendRequest in SAP MDK
entry.content:
Dear MDK experts,

In my iOS app build using SAP MDK. I am trying to get a PDF by calling the URL received in previous step from Adobe. When application runs on web using fetch command, it works fine and I am able to get the PDF file as the response is processed by the browser correctly. However, on iOS using sendRequest the response received is not straight forward or may be I am unable to process it correctly. 

Could you please help me with the correct way of handling the PDF response in this case. I have tried multiple ways but it just does not work.

Details: the response received is in the following format:

data = {length = 171568, bytes = 0x25504446 2d312e37 0d25e2e3 cfd30d0a ... 0a252545 4f460d0a };
    headers =     {
        "Accept-Ranges" = bytes;
        "Content-Length" = 171568;
        "Content-Type" = "application/pdf";
        Date = "Tue, 16 Jul 2024 11:08:10 GMT";
        Etag = "\\"9c3125582e1dc11f94f9304ffa12b7dd\\"";
        "Last-Modified" = "Tue, 16 Jul 2024 11:07:57 GMT";
        Server = AmazonS3;
        "Strict-Transport-Security" = "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload;";
        Via = "1.1 fde85e7daa13f95cf6b8f5fa09c62ef6.cloudfront.net (CloudFront)";
        "x-amz-cf-id" = "M0ObxiQjt3eRsE1uuDlEGzlToEH_GNozAKOeFp8LIGhkjDD4KxdIsw==";
        "x-amz-cf-pop" = "FRA56-P7";
        "x-amz-expiration" = "expiry-date=\\"Thu, 18 Jul 2024 00:00:00 GMT\\", rule-id=\\"YTNmNmJlMTktM2U4YS00NDhhLTkyNzEtNjk1NTc3NGZlMDBj\\"";
        "x-amz-id-2" = "OAvPSYiXsOkwEiKzADCWqN/AGIxCB/9tUEwqSsHNHSzr4/Az+9zDTb3ZeFqFPl5+TssIH7CyebK4DLc;
    }
}`;

here bytes contain the pdf data.

On checking the Mobile Network Trace in Mobile Services on Visual Studio, I was able to see the pdf response in the preview section. So, its on the part where we to correctly process the PDF.

 

Here is the code:

fetchUntilDone(fileRequestOptions, 5000) // Add a delay of 5 second (1000 milliseconds)
                            .then((response) => {
                              let dwnlUrl = response.asset.downloadUri;
                              let path = dwnlUrl.replace("https://dcplatformstorageservice-prod-us-east-1.s3-accelerate.amazonaws.com", "");
                              let pdfPath = "/getFinalPdf" + path;
                              let pdfActualUrl = clientAPI.getPageProxy().getControl('SectionedTable0').getControl('FC_pdfpath');
                              pdfActualUrl.setValue(path);
                            
                              const dwnldOptions = {

                                "method": "GET",
                                "responseType": "arraybuffer"
                              }
                              if (platform.isWeb == true) {
                                return fetch(dwnlUrl); //works seamlessly
                              }
                              else {
                                return clientAPI.sendRequest(pdfPath, dwnldOptions); //returns pdf but unable to process
                              }
.then((response) => {
                              

                              if (!platform.isWeb) {
                                if (response.statusCode != 200) {
                                  throw new Error('Network response was not ok ' + response.statusText);
                                }
                                // Assuming the raw data is available as a string in response.content._responseAndData
                                return response.content._responseAndData.toString();
                              }
                              else {
                                return response;
                              }


                            })

                            .then((rawData) => {
                              if (!platform.isWeb) {
                                //New approach start
                                function convertToJSON(rawData) {
                                  // Replace `=` with `:` and ensure proper formatting
                                  const formattedData = rawData
                                    .replace(/=\s*/g, ': ')
                                    .replace(/:\s*'/g, ': "')
                                    .replace(/'/g, '"')
                                    .replace(/,\s*}/g, '}')
                                    .replace(/;\s*}/g, '}')
                                    .replace(/;\s*$/g, '')
                                    .replace(/;\s*headers/g, ', headers');
                                  // Ensure keys without quotes are handled
                                  const keyValuePairs = formattedData.match(/(\w+)\s*😕g);
                                  if (keyValuePairs) {
                                    keyValuePairs.forEach(pair => {
                                      const key = pair.replace(':', '').trim();
                                      formattedData = formattedData.replace(new RegExp(`\\b${key}\\b`), `"${key}"`);
                                    });
                                  }
                                  return JSON.parse(formattedData);
                                }

                                function hexStringToByteArray(hexString) {
                                  if (!hexString) return new Uint8Array();
                                  let cleanHexString = hexString.replace(/[^0-9a-fA-F]/g, ''); // Remove any non-hex characters
                                  let byteArray = new Uint8Array(cleanHexString.length / 2);
                                  for (let i = 0; i < cleanHexString.length; i += 2) {
                                    byteArray[i / 2] = parseInt(cleanHexString.substr(i, 2), 16);
                                  }
                                  return byteArray;
                                }

                                function convertHexToBlob(hexString) {
                                  const byteArray = hexStringToByteArray(hexString);
                                  const blob = new Blob([byteArray], { type: 'application/pdf' });
                                  return blob;
                                }


                                try {
                                  const json = convertToJSON(rawData);
                                  if (json && json.data && json.data.bytes) {
                                    const hexString = json.data.bytes.replace(/\s+/g, '').replace('0x', ''); // Clean hex string
                                    const pdfBlob = convertHexToBlob(hexString);
                                    console.log(pdfBlob); // You now have the PDF blob
                                  } else {
                                    console.error('Failed to extract bytes');
                                  }
                                } catch (error) {
                                  console.error('Error converting to JSON:', error);
                                }
                              }
                              else {
                                return rawData.blob();
                              }

                            })

Kindly let me know if you see anything wrong or help me find the right way to process pdf.

@bill_froelich 

Best Regards,

Geet Bijlani

entry.title: Re: query style
entry.content:
Hello @liuteng1 

Kindly refer to the below info for creating your own CAQs. Looks like field selection has not been done and further layout has not been defined for rows and column.


https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-members/how-to-use-custom-analytical-queries-in-sap-s-4hana-embedded-analytics/ba-p/13541501 

 

Additional
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/33f3a229ecfe438ca6b2053c48b4e1bb.html?version=2408.500 


https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-q-a/s-4hana-cloud-editable-fields-in-custom-analytical-query/qaq-p/12749645 

 

Best Regards,
Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: Public Sector in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408
entry.content:
Hi @MaryRamsrud 

thank you for this blog. In the overview of Public Cloud 2408, it was mentioned that overhead allocation using Assessment Cycles or Distribution cycles are completely deprecated. However in Private cloud systems, Universal Allocation and Funds Management (Public Sector Management) were not compatible. Is this something that was solved within this 2408 release? 

Thanks for your reply,

Kurt

entry.title: Standard API to fetch Shipping Point Address details of Outbound Delivery
entry.content:
Is there a standard API which can be used to fetch Shipping Point Address details of an Outbound Delivery?
Can only get the shipping point ID from the below API
Overview | Outbound Delivery (A2X) | SAP Business Accelerator Hub

entry.title: SAP BO 4.3 Publication can be created but changed or updated
entry.content:
Dear Community, I have a question

After SAP BO Upgrade 4.3 we cannot update or change a publication object

We can create a new one but after created, we cannot change nothing. The save button is not working anymore

On the CMC Platform it is continue working and we can change there but our AdHoc Users should not access to the CMC.

Before the Upgrade it was working but now it is not possible, Do you have similar experiences?

Can somebody try to create a publication and hours later try to change something, for example the description (On the BI Platform, not CMC) having

Many thanks in advance

 

 

Mary

entry.title: Re: Flex Working at SAP
entry.content: Well, after reading this, I'm certainly adding SAP Melbourne to my travel wish-list. Great article!

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano ,

Firstly,  thank you very much for the opportunity. I have completed my course of Integrated business planning and ready to write exam. I have also registered on  https://www.sap.com/cmp/dg/digital-skills/index.html and that is I have finished with step 4 dropped my mail with all details to digitalskills@sap.com. My username is soumya5 and mail ID is soumya.chakraborty2023@siib.ac.in. Can you please check through the process and help me get the voucher so that I can finish my exam ASAP, and get certified because my placement season at my college starts soon.

Thanks & Regards,
Soumya Chakraborty

entry.title: Re: NFe Cloud Outbound - Outbound Invoicing Option for Brazil - Como funciona?
entry.content:

Abraços,

entry.title: Re: is it possible to lock and unlock a transaction?
entry.content: @Sahiil , for recent versions look at SM01_CUST (and SM01_DEV) there are reports behind those transactions (e.g. RSAUDITC_BCE)  that can be scheduled with variants.

entry.title: Re: Error Sync PriceDiscountList in CCO
entry.content:
Detailed error message:

2024-08-26 15:01:16,286 [BYD_SCHEDULER_Worker-3] INFO com.sap.scco.ap.pos.job.DiscountJob - >>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>>> DiscountJob started
2024-08-26 15:01:16,286 [BYD_SCHEDULER_Worker-3] INFO com.sap.scco.ap.pos.job.DiscountJob - Loading discount data ...
2024-08-26 15:01:18,118 [BaseCallbackThread] ERROR com.sap.scco.ap.pos.i14y.util.callback.AbstractBaseCallbackThread - something failed while processing DTOs
com.sap.scco.util.exception.XState: javax.persistence.RollbackException: java.lang.IllegalStateException: During synchronization a new object was found through a relationship that was not marked cascade PERSIST: MaterialEntity [getKey()=632bd4ad-fcdb-47c5-a7e0-b71c790d2d41, externalID=KO1002100010, isSet=false, isActive=true, priceDiscounts=[]].
at com.sap.scco.ap.pos.i14y.util.callback.impl.PriceDiscountDTORetrieveListCallback.process(PriceDiscountDTORetrieveListCallback.java:89)
at com.sap.scco.ap.pos.i14y.util.callback.AbstractBaseCallbackThread.run(AbstractBaseCallbackThread.java:174)
Caused by: javax.persistence.RollbackException: java.lang.IllegalStateException: During synchronization a new object was found through a relationship that was not marked cascade PERSIST: MaterialEntity [getKey()=632bd4ad-fcdb-47c5-a7e0-b71c790d2d41, externalID=KO1002100010, isSet=false, isActive=true, priceDiscounts=[]].
at org.eclipse.persistence.internal.jpa.transaction.EntityTransactionImpl.commit(EntityTransactionImpl.java:161)
at com.sap.scco.ap.pos.dao.CDBSession.commitTransaction(CDBSession.java:213)
at com.sap.scco.ap.pos.i14y.util.callback.impl.PriceDiscountDTORetrieveListCallback.process(PriceDiscountDTORetrieveListCallback.java:81)
... 1 common frames omitted
Caused by: java.lang.IllegalStateException: During synchronization a new object was found through a relationship that was not marked cascade PERSIST: MaterialEntity [getKey()=632bd4ad-fcdb-47c5-a7e0-b71c790d2d41, externalID=KO1002100010, isSet=false, isActive=true, priceDiscounts=[]].
at org.eclipse.persistence.internal.sessions.RepeatableWriteUnitOfWork.discoverUnregisteredNewObjects(RepeatableWriteUnitOfWork.java:315)
at org.eclipse.persistence.internal.sessions.UnitOfWorkImpl.calculateChanges(UnitOfWorkImpl.java:782)
at org.eclipse.persistence.internal.sessions.UnitOfWorkImpl.commitToDatabaseWithChangeSet(UnitOfWorkImpl.java:1578)
at org.eclipse.persistence.internal.sessions.RepeatableWriteUnitOfWork.commitRootUnitOfWork(RepeatableWriteUnitOfWork.java:280)
at org.eclipse.persistence.internal.sessions.UnitOfWorkImpl.commitAndResume(UnitOfWorkImpl.java:1230)
at org.eclipse.persistence.internal.jpa.transaction.EntityTransactionImpl.commit(EntityTransactionImpl.java:136)
... 3 common frames omitted

entry.title: Re: Task 3 - Enhancing CDS View Entities with Annotations

entry.title: Re: Get to know more on Modular Pricing Procedures in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition
entry.content:
Hallo @Anjane_tanneeru 

This error can be resolved by implementing 3364560 - Subprocedure not found when using KOMK fields as parameter.

This will allow you to use the standard KOMK fields with no enhancement/ coding. 

Regards

entry.title: Jr. ABAP Consultant with SAP CAPM Experience
entry.content:
Job Title: Jr. ABAP Developer
Company: Netherland Based SAP Product Company
Join Date: Immediate
Experience : Min 3+ yrs
Location: Bangalore (Hybrid Model- South Bangalore Office)
Contact: Siva- 9963598500
Must Have: Knowledge in ODATA Services, ABAP Restful Architecture, CAPM, ABAP Core Skillset, experience in Ui5 and node is a value addition.

entry.title: Sr. Node JS Developer
entry.content:
Job Title: Sr. Node Developer
Company: Netherland Based SAP Pricing Optmisation Software Product Company
Join Date: Immediate
Experience : Min 6+ yrs
 Location: Bangalore (Hybrid Model- South Bangalore Office)
Must Have: SAP BTP (CAPM) Model, SAP HANA, SAP Ui5 Understanding, Experience in Java Programming.

Reach out to me if you are interested via mobile:9963598500.

Reg

Siva

entry.title: Re: S4HC/过账日期的库存能否自定义增加字段
entry.content:
Hello @030093 ,

For web-gui apps also custom field can be created. Kindly refer on how to do so.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/3ace5ee99c924eaca6f31780980d0d31.html?version=2408.500

Also make the use of relevant business context available for the app 'Post Goods Movement'.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/85a220ae29a745aab169b630791d0487.html?version=2408.500 

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Multiple Quality Bins - One for Recieving and one for production
entry.content:
Business wants to have two Quality Bin locations and tied to two different process

1. On GR from supplier to Quality Bin location QUA-1

2. On GR from Production to Wuality Bin Location QUA-2

After either inpsection is completed standard putway is applied to move to WH storage

entry.title: Re: Recursion in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
The first program will have no output, unless a WRITE is added before the subtraction 😉

Regarding "me", unless you have to pass the reference to another object / method, using it within the class is normally not needed.

More to the point, there are legitimate use cases where recursion is the obvious choice, for example exploring a deep structure is easier to do recursively than iteratively.

entry.title: Groovy Script for removing reserved character inside XML node
entry.content:
Dear CPI experts. 

Good day, 

Looking to get assistance with my requirement below. 

The idea is to remove all below reserved characters from inside the all XML nodes if they are present.

However below script im trying to work with, but does not work. It is not preserving the XML structure hence the entire output is incorrect.

reserved characters *%?:;=()[]|#@

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import groovy.xml.XmlUtil
import groovy.util.XmlSlurper

def Message processData(Message message) {
    def body = message.getBody(String) 

    def root = new XmlSlurper().parseText(body)

    def cleanNodeContent
    cleanNodeContent = { node ->
        if (node instanceof groovy.util.slurpersupport.NodeChild) {
            if (node.text()) {
                // Remove reserved characters: *%?:;=()[]|#@
                def cleanedText = node.text().replaceAll('[*%?:;=()\\[\\]\\|#@]', '')
                node.setValue(cleanedText)
            }
        }

        node.children().each { child ->
            cleanNodeContent(child)
        }
    }

    cleanNodeContent(root)

    def cleanedXml = XmlUtil.serialize(root)

    message.setBody(cleanedXml) // Set the modified body back to the message
    return message
}

 #

entry.title: Re: process flow for pr not showing if po created from co...
entry.content:
Hello @sharana 

Process which should have been followed

- Contract
- PR with Contract assigned for source of supply
- PO with reference to PR.

Best Regards,
Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: Live data replication from SAP ASE database to MS Sql Server database.
entry.content: Note that the ASE-to-MSSQL Sybase/SAP Replication Server product is discontinued.  See https://me.sap.com/notes/3408368 and https://me.sap.com/notes/2702069

entry.title: We need an ask a question button.
entry.content:
Hi  Masters,

SAP Community has changed its design and moved to a new site. On the previous site, I could easily find the "ask a question" button. I could go to my profile and find the questions I had asked. Now I can't do any of these things.

To ask a question (to open a new question), I can go to the question I have asked before and do this in the small area on the right. This area only appears in a question I have asked. I can't access it from anywhere else.

Can't we create a single ask a question button? Am I the only one having this problem?

 

 

On the previous site, I could access "my questions" from my profile. Now that is gone.

 

Am I the only one having this problem?

 

Thanks .

entry.title: Re: ​SAP S4HANA Public Cloud - Strategic Sourcing - Auto-...
entry.content:
Hello @islamsol4241_5 

I guess this has been answered via below

https://community.sap.com/t5/spend-management-q-a/sap-ariba-strategic-sourcing-auto-set-a-due-date-for-rfp-response/qaq-p/12785260#:~:text=In%20other%20words%2C%20%5Bthe%20due,will%20be%205%20working%20days.

Best Regards,

Vijayendra

entry.title: Re: Error while doing Billing related installation
entry.content: Please cross check if you have provided CA/BP that was used to move-in into the specified installation.

entry.title: Re: Is there an API to track changes made to Business Partners (BP) in the last 24 hours?
entry.content:
Hi,

Could transaction code BPCD help?

Best Regards,Grace

entry.title: Real Talk with SAP TechEd Track Leads
entry.content:
Ready to get to know the experts who will be shaping your SAP TechEd experience this year? Introducing Real Talk with SAP TechEd Track Leads, where you'll meet the minds behind the tracks in this 6-part personal blog series leading up to the October virtual event days.

Every #TrackLeadTuesday, we'll reveal a fresh new intro blog from one or two of our 2024 track leads, bringing you closer to the SAP insiders guiding your upcoming TechEd journey. Learn more about what drives their passion, what's in store from their focus topic, and more.

On the Roster

  • [TOMORROW] Meet Claire | Application Development & Automation Track Lead
  • Meet Konstantin & Stephanie | SAP Business Technology Platform Track Leads
  • Meet Katya & Jerome | Artificial Intelligence Track Leads
  • Meet Eduardo & Britta | Data & Analytics Track Leads
  • Meet Suna | Digital Transformation with Cloud ERP Track Lead
  • Meet Shilpa & Ananth | Integration Track Leads

Ask, Share, Connect

Networking with fellow attendees and experts remains one of the top benefits for participating in SAP TechEd. But why wait? Let's start the conversation now! Our track leads can't wait to meet you. Here are some suggestions to help give them a warm welcome:

  • Introduce Yourself: Comment your name, job, and a little about yourself and what you're excited for at TechEd.
  • Share Your TechEd Toolkit: An open mind? Good notepad? Share what tools are must-haves for you at TechEd and see what others are packing.
  • Ask a Question: Something track-specific you’re curious about? Ask our track leads in the comments.

See you in the comments!

entry.title: Re: SAP readiness check for S4HANA report takes days to complete
entry.content: A ST12 trace may be helpful here. After doing analysis on the ST12 trace, you could perform research with the FM/Method, which spent most of the time.

entry.title: Re: Destination from S/4HANA to Ariba CIG - Direct connection to testacig.ariba.com refused
entry.content: what was the fix for this issue?
